chain.thought: Explanation: The Olympic years listed are 2008 (10th place) and 2012 (8th place). The best finish was 8th place in 2012, which is better than 10th in 2008.

judge_thought: Explanation: The table shows Olympic Games entries in 2008 (Beijing) with a 10th place finish and in 2012 (London) with an 8th place finish. Among these, 8th place in 2012 is the better (higher) finish. Therefore, 2012 is the year of the best Olympic finish.
